reviews.comment:
Es un oasis en medio del desierto, excelente para descansar un poco después y seguir viaje, le faltaría un hospedaje así estaría completo .

(Translated by Google)
It is an oasis in the middle of the desert, excellent for resting a bit afterwards and continuing your journey. It only needs accommodation so it would be complete.

reviews.comment:
Malisima atención, nunca tienen débito y no dan tickets, el personal es mal hablado y mal educado.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service, they never have debit cards and don't give out receipts, the staff is foul-mouthed and rude.

reviews.comment:
Ha mejorado muchísimo .... parque ... comedor cocina y atencion toda la noche ya que antes no tenia .... baños la gente no los cuida .... amplio predio para descanso .... buena atención ...

(Translated by Google)
It's improved a lot... park... dining area, kitchen, and all-night service, which it didn't have before... bathrooms are poorly maintained... spacious grounds for relaxation... good service...
